variant: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

request.message: build me a full skincare starter guide: a product table, a timeline, a checklist, and key stats

response_body.response:
here's your foundation stack: cleanser, azelaic acid (am), and hydration. you'll add a retinoid later once your barrier settles. the goal is to kill inflammation first, then texture.

the

products.name: CeraVe Foaming Facial Cleanser
products.description: Foaming yet non-stripping — for oily/acne-prone skin types.

products.name: The Ordinary Azelaic Acid Suspension 10%
products.description: Azelaic acid for redness, PIH, and mild rosacea — pregnancy-safe.

products.name: Hero Cosmetics Mighty Patch Original (36ct)
products.description: Hydrocolloid patches — pull pus from active spots, prevent picking.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

rows: removes oil and buildup without stripping
kills acne bacteria, fades pih, reduces redness

steps.label: week 1–2
steps.detail: cleanser + azelaic am + moisturizer. expect mild irritation as skin adjusts. don't add anything else.

steps.label: week 3–4
steps.detail: azelaic working — redness and active spots starting to calm. barrier feels more stable. skin texture slightly smoother.

steps.label: week 5–6
steps.detail: visible reduction in active acne. pih (post-acne marks) fading slowly. oil production normalizing.

steps.label: week 7–8
steps.detail: acne mostly clear or dramatically reduced. texture and tone noticeably improved. ready to add retinoid if desired.

items: get the cleanser, azelaic acid, and a ceramide moisturizer this week
start am: cleanser → azelaic → moisturizer → spf. pm: cleanser → moisturizer
use azelaic acid every morning for 8 weeks — consistency beats perfection
apply spf every single morning, no exceptions
use patches on active spots at night to prevent picking
don't stack actives — azelaic is your only active for now
if skin feels tight or flaky after week 1, dial back to every other day azelaic, then rebuild
track how your skin looks every 2 weeks — take a photo in the same light

cards.label: stick rate when doing am + pm
max actives at once
cards.hint: stacking kills absorption and damages barrier

cards.label: non-negotiable minimum
cards.hint: uv worsens acne marks and pigmentation
